name: Loir-et-Cher (France)
description: Per fess wavy, blue above and gold below; in chief two gold fleurs-de-lis beneath a white label, in base a single blue fleur-de-lis.
history: The fleurs-de-lis and label recall the counts of Blois and Vendôme, while the wavy division evokes the rivers Loir and Cher.

features.role: per fess wavy blue over gold with gold fleurs-de-lis and label in chief and a blue fleur-de-lis in base
